message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "laboratory coordinator" as labCoordinator
participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as labCoordinatorUI
participant ":ValidateTestReportController" as validateTestReportController
participant ":Company" as company
participant "rp : TestStore" as testStore
participant "rp : Test" as test
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as testReportStore
participant "rp : TestReport" as testReport
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as testDiagnosis

labCoordinator -> labCoordinatorUI : 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis
labCoordinatorUI -> validateTestReportController : 2 createTestList()
validateTestReportController -> company : 3 get = testReportsToValidate()
company -> testStore : 4 get = testReportsToValidate()
testStore -> test : 5 get = getTestList()
company -> testReportStore : 6 get = testReportsToValidate()
testReportStore -> testReport : 7 get = getTestReportList()
testReport -> testDiagnosis : 8 get = getTestDiagnosis()

activate validateTestReportController
activate labCoordinatorUI
activate company
activate testStore
activate test
activate testReportStore
activate testReport
activate testDiagnosis

labCoordinatorUI --> labCoordinator : 10 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection
labCoordinator -> labCoordinatorUI : 11 chooses all tests
labCoordinatorUI --> validateTestReportController : 12 asks for confirmation
labCoordinator -> labCoordinatorUI : 13 confirms selection

validateTestReportController -> validateTestReportController : 14 validateAllTestReport()
activate validateTestReportController
loop
  validateTestReportController -> testStore : 15 validateTestReport(testId)
  testStore -> testStore : 16 setState(VAIDATED)
  validateTestReportController -> testStore : 17 registerValidationDate(date)
  testStore -> testStore : 18 setValidationDate(date)
end

labCoordinatorUI --> labCoordinator : 19 informs operation success

deactivate testDiagnosis
deactivate testReport
deactivate testReportStore
deactivate test
deactivate testStore
deactivate company
deactivate validateTestReportController
deactivate labCoordinatorUI

@enduml
